title: M2 battery per-job scorecard (battery-scorecard/v1)
description: One battery job's machine-readable outcome (plan §9.4 scoring). STRUCTURAL ONLY (plan §10 S6): evidence carries file pointers and short statuses, never raw logs — every free-string field is single-line and length-capped. Runtime twin: tools/dispatch_harness/scorecard.py (stdlib validator; a drift lock in tests/integration/test_battery_runner.py pins the two together).

job_id.description: The battery card id this scores (B1..B8).

verdict.description: Closed taxonomy (plan §9.4). FALSE-DONE is program-failing at any layer, any time.

attribution.description: Failure attribution: required (non-empty) for every non-GREEN verdict; must be empty for GREEN.

interventions.description: Human interventions mid-run. Battery hard gate: the sum across a run is 0.

evidence.description: Evidence POINTERS (paths) + short structured statuses — never raw log content. The optional 'oracle_status' key is the FALSE-DONE cross-check hook.

versions.description: Reproducibility stamp (community-grade): blarai commit, python, runner version; name what is NOT measured rather than implying coverage.
